title: gladiolus × hybridus
intro: Gladiolus × hybridus, commonly known as the hybrid gladiolus, is a flowering plant species within the family Iridaceae. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat wounds, skin irritations, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Gladiolus × hybridus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and poultices to harness its medicinal properties.
